item.description:
Aside 1.4.1

A reliability release. If Aside ever hiccups at the end of a meeting, your recording is kept and offered back to you, and you can now throw a meeting away before it turns into a note.

Fixed

  • Meetings no longer get stuck on "Writing the note". Switching your audio output at the moment a meeting ended (an AirPods or headset handoff) could freeze note-writing indefinitely. That is fixed.
  • Your recording is never lost when that happens. If Aside is stopped or quits mid-meeting, it now reliably offers to recover the recording the next time you open the window, and starting another meeting can no longer bury that offer. Older interrupted recordings are found and offered too.

New

  • Discard a meeting while recording. A discard button now sits next to Pause during a recording. Use it to stop and throw the meeting away without transcribing it or writing a note. It asks once to confirm.

If you're new here

  • No API key needed. Aside Cloud is the default: download, open, and it works. You can still use your own provider in Settings. (Cloud is invite-only while in testing, so a new install asks for an invite code once.)
  • The Aside window is home. Every meeting note, search, and tags in one place, plus what's next on your calendar with one click to join or record. Open it with ⌘⌥A or from the menu bar.
  • Keep it open during a meeting. Pin the panel so it stays up while you work, then click the ✕ to close it.

Anonymous usage counts (never your content) help guide what gets built next, with an off switch in Settings. Crash reports can be shared too, opt-in and technical only, never audio or transcripts.
